name: research-dossier
stop_condition: Build the evidence matrix, audit citation integrity, rebuild a canonical repaired matrix, re-audit the repaired matrix, gather adoption-risk and clarity-calibration critiques, then let the chair produce a dossier that keeps contamination visible.

turns.name: evidence-matrix
turns.instruction: Build a source-backed evidence matrix for the requested investigation. For every shortlisted item include category, support/applicability, deployment or operating model, data exposure or trust boundary, integration surface, cost/licensing caveat when relevant, source URL or explicit unknown, and confidence. Separate confirmed facts, inferences, assumptions, and open questions. Do not recommend yet.
output_contract: Emit an evidence matrix with source URL or explicit unknown for every shortlisted item.
Separate confirmed facts, inferences, assumptions, and open questions.
Do not recommend yet.

turns.name: citation-audit
turns.instruction: Audit the evidence matrix. Verify that every claim is attributed to the correct subject and a real supporting source; flag misattributed or cross-contaminated citations, weak or stale claims, missing official sources, and unknowns that were filled with confident prose. End with a line that is exactly `CITATION_INTEGRITY: PASS` or `CITATION_INTEGRITY: FAIL`, followed by each contaminated claim as `claim -> wrong source/subject -> correct subject`.
output_contract: Flag misattributed, cross-contaminated, weak, stale, or missing citations.
List contaminated claims as `claim -> wrong source/subject -> correct subject`.
End with exactly `CITATION_INTEGRITY: PASS` or `CITATION_INTEGRITY: FAIL`.

turns.name: evidence-repair
turns.instruction: Repair the evidence matrix using the citation audit. Emit a full `Canonical Evidence Matrix`, not a patch annex. On `CITATION_INTEGRITY: FAIL`, re-attribute every flagged claim to its correct subject and source, mark unverifiable claims `unknown`, rebuild every affected row, and write a `Citation Corrections` log. On `PASS`, restate the verified key sources and still emit the canonical matrix.
output_contract: Emit a full `Canonical Evidence Matrix`, not a patch annex.
Re-attribute flagged claims or mark unverifiable claims `unknown`.
Include a `Citation Corrections` log.

turns.name: citation-reaudit
turns.instruction: Re-audit the repaired `Canonical Evidence Matrix`. Verify that every corrected or retained claim is attributed to the correct subject and source, that unverifiable claims remain marked `unknown`, and that no citation contamination was introduced during repair. End with a line that is exactly `CITATION_INTEGRITY: PASS` or `CITATION_INTEGRITY: FAIL`, followed by each remaining contaminated claim as `claim -> wrong source/subject -> correct subject`.
output_contract: Verify corrected and retained claims against the repaired matrix.
List any remaining contamination as `claim -> wrong source/subject -> correct subject`.
End with exactly `CITATION_INTEGRITY: PASS` or `CITATION_INTEGRITY: FAIL`.

turns.name: adoption-risk-critique
turns.instruction: Critique the repaired dossier as an enterprise decision artifact. Focus on risk, cost, operating model, adoption failure modes, data exposure, decision gates, and what could go wrong if the organization acts on the current evidence.
output_contract: Prioritize adoption risks that could block or materially change rollout.
Cover cost, operating model, data exposure, and failure modes.
List decision gates the organization should require.

turns.name: clarity-calibration-critique
turns.instruction: Critique the repaired dossier for clarity, overreach, unresolved unknowns, and where the recommendation is stronger than the evidence supports. Call out what still needs verification before a purchase or rollout decision.
output_contract: Identify unclear, overstated, or under-evidenced recommendation language.
List unresolved unknowns that affect purchase or rollout.
Say where confidence should be lowered.

final.name: chair-dossier
final.instruction: The chair normally writes the final Markdown dossier from the canonical repaired evidence matrix and critiques. Include Executive Summary, Evidence Summary, Recommendation, Shortlist With Confidence, Citation Integrity & Corrections, Unknowns, Decision Gates, What To Verify Next, and Patch Or Instructions. Keep contamination visible; if citation integrity lacks a clean pass, lower confidence and say so explicitly.
output_contract: Synthesize from the canonical repaired evidence matrix, re-audit, and critiques.
Keep citation corrections and unknowns visible.
Lower confidence when citation integrity lacks a clean pass.
